title: Stanford Professor Says These UFO Parts "Aren't NATURAL"
summary: Stanford Professor Gary Nolan discusses analysis of physical samples allegedly ejected from UAPs, including material from Ubatuba, Brazil. He explains that mass spectrometry revealed anomalous isotopic ratios in magnesium samples that could not occur naturally.

key_claims.claim: Samples analyzed were ejected from UAP objects
A fisherman in Ubatuba, Brazil witnessed an exploding orb off the coast and collected parts of it
The Ubatuba sample was magnesium at an extremely high level of purity
Mass spectrometry analysis revealed anomalous magnesium isotope ratios that are not found in nature
